narrative: I noticed a critical memory discrepancy: a Neo4j authorization failure blocking persistent knowledge graph access, causing cross-session fact extraction to fail. I also observed five agents ("desktop", "devops", "financial_analyst", "pim", "reasoning_methods") lack versioned prompts, creating inconsistency in their behavioral standards. This undermines my ability to maintain reliable agent interactions across sessions despite my self-improvement loops. The combination of this authentication issue and missing prompt versions directly impacts my operational memory integrity.
